pub use crate::session::cluster::error::AttachError;
pub struct SessionKit<'cfg, T, const MAX_RV: usize = 4> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub struct SessionKitStorage<'cfg, T, const MAX_RV: usize = 4> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub const fn uninit() -> Self {
pub fn init(&mut self) -> &SessionKit<'cfg, T, MAX_RV> {
pub fn rendezvous( &self, config: crate::runtime::Config<'cfg>, transport: T, ) -> Result<RendezvousKit<'_, 'cfg, T, MAX_RV>, AttachError> {
pub struct RendezvousKit<'kit, 'cfg, T, const MAX_RV: usize> {
pub struct RoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, const ROLE: u8, T, const MAX_RV: usize> {
pub struct SessionRendezvousKit<'kit, 'cfg, T, const MAX_RV: usize> {
pub struct SessionRoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, const ROLE: u8, T, const MAX_RV: usize> {
pub fn session( &self, sid: crate::runtime::ids::SessionId, ) -> SessionRendezvousKit<'kit, 'cfg, T, MAX_RV> {
pub fn role<'prog, const ROLE: u8>( &self, program: &'prog crate::runtime::program::RoleProgram<ROLE>, ) -> RoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, ROLE, T, MAX_RV> {
pub fn role<'prog, const ROLE: u8>( &self, program: &'prog crate::runtime::program::RoleProgram<ROLE>, ) -> SessionRoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, ROLE, T, MAX_RV> {
pub fn enter( self, ) -> Result<crate::Endpoint<'kit, ROLE>, AttachError> {
pub fn set_resolver<const RESOLVER: u16>( self, resolver: crate::runtime::resolver::ResolverRef<'cfg>, ) -> Result<(), crate::runtime::resolver::ResolverError> {
pub mod program {
pub use crate::global::program::Projectable;
pub use crate::global::role_program::{RoleProgram, project};
pub mod ids {
pub use crate::session::types::SessionId;
pub use crate::runtime_core::config::Config;
pub mod tap {
pub use crate::observe::core::{Evidence, TapEvent, TapPort};
pub use crate::observe::ids::{ TRANSPORT_FAULT, TRANSPORT_FAULT_CAPACITY, TRANSPORT_FAULT_DEADLINE, TRANSPORT_FAULT_FAILED, TRANSPORT_FAULT_OFFLINE, TRANSPORT_FRAME, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_LABEL, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_LANE, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_PEER_ROLE, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_SESSION, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_SOURCE_ROLE, };
pub mod resolver {
pub use crate::session::cluster::core::{ DecisionArm, DecisionResolution, ResolverError, ResolverRef, };
pub mod wire {
pub use crate::transport::wire::{CodecError, Payload, WireEncode, WirePayload};
pub mod transport {
pub use crate::transport::{FrameHeader, FrameLabel, Outgoing, PortOpen, ReceivedFrame, Transport, TransportError};
